title: Vanilla Plus
description: Vanilla Plus modpack focused on performance, visuals and quality-of-life
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64bfe2447f11b901e2e2df5ac7ed1d6d455d1cf3.png)

# Vanilla Plus

**Vanilla Plus** is a lightweight **Vanilla+ client-side modpack** focused on stunning visuals, high performance, immersive audio, and quality-of-life improvements — while preserving the original Minecraft experience.

The goal is simple: **Minecraft, just better.** No new gameplay mechanics, no balance changes — only a smoother, cleaner, and more immersive vanilla experience.

## 🟩 Visuals & Immersion

* **Iris Shaders** with **Complementary Shaders – Reimagined**
* Improved lighting, weather, clouds, rain, and atmospheric effects
* High-quality particle enhancements
* Connected textures and seamless block transitions
* Fresh Animations with extended entity animations
* 3D models for armor, food, books, flowers, crops, ores, paintings, shields, and more
* Enhanced item, entity, and environment visuals

## 🟫 Audio Experience

* Realistic sound propagation with **Sound Physics Remastered**
* Enhanced thunder, rain, ambient sounds, and music
* Increased sound channel limits for richer environments

## 🟦 Quality of Life

* Better inventory management and sorting
* Improved UI with smooth animations and scrolling
* Dynamic crosshair and cleaner HUD elements
* Zoom, held item information, and pickup notifications
* Shulker previews and numerous interface improvements
* Click-through inventory interactions

## 🟨 Performance

* Modern Fabric optimization stack
* Sodium + Iris + ImmediatelyFast + Entity Culling + More Culling
* Optimized rendering, particles, models, and chunk loading
* Excellent FPS with or without shaders
* No gameplay compromises or visual shortcuts

## 🧱 Building & Exploration

* **Axiom** for advanced building and world editing
* **Voxy** for massive view distances and efficient terrain rendering
* Great for creative projects, screenshots, and large survival worlds

## 🌍 Multiplayer

* Fully **client-side**
* Compatible with vanilla servers
* Built-in proximity voice chat
* No server-side installation required

## 💎 Features

* Vanilla-compatible worlds
* No new items, mobs, or gameplay mechanics
* Beautiful visuals and immersive atmosphere
* Smooth animations and responsive UI
* High performance
* Perfect for survival, building, exploration, and multiplayer
